name: minds
description: Query AI personas of real people — founders, customers, domain experts — from inside Codex. For spec review, persona-driven product decisions, UX research, and red-team panels. By getminds.ai.

interface.shortDescription: AI persona panels for research, inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Query AI personas of founders, customers, and domain experts on any decision — spec review, persona-driven product calls, UX research, and red-team panels — without leaving Codex. Wraps the Minds MCP server (getminds.ai). Requires a personal Minds API key.
